nasb.text: The angel of God, who had been going before the camp of Israel, moved and went behind them; and the pillar of cloud moved from before them and stood behind them.

esv.text: Then the angel of God who was going before the host of Israel moved and went behind them, and the pillar of cloud moved from before them and stood behind them,

cnv.text: 在以色列營前行走的　神的使者，轉到他們後面去；雲柱也從他們前面轉過去，立在他們後面。

ccb.text: 这时，在以色列人前面领路的上帝的天使，转到百姓后面，云柱也随着移到后面立住。
